scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --persist-to apps/memos/.wrangler/state --config apps/memos/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.d1:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config apps/memos/wrangler.jsonc
scripts.check: pnpm --filter @my-memos/app prepare && vp check && svelte-check --workspace packages/ui --tsconfig tsconfig.json && svelte-check --workspace apps/memos --tsconfig tsconfig.check.json && tsgo --noEmit
